meta.title: Coworking Café Essaouira | Rimal Network — 200 Mbps WiFi
meta.description: Café coworking space in Essaouira: 200 Mbps fiber WiFi, filtered water, black coffee or tea included with every pass. Open space from 25 DH, private office, phone booth. Mon–Sat 9:30–21:00. El Raounak, 355.

hero.title:
Work to the Rhythm
of the Atlantic
hero.subtitle: A unique café-coworking space in the heart of Essaouira. Fiber optic WiFi, premium coffee and an inspiring community.

about.title: Productivity & Moroccan authenticity
about.description: We are so happy to have you here. We are the couple behind this cozy co-working café. Coming from different careers but sharing the same passion and energy — AND ONE DREAM: to create a calm, warm, inspiring place where people can focus, connect and grow.
about.description2: We believe that your environment can change everything. We believe in your journey — and we are excited to be part of it.

services.title: Our Plans
services.subtitle: Flexible hourly rates or monthly membership — find the plan that works for you.

amenities.title: Everything to Work Efficiently
amenities.subtitle: A space designed down to the last detail for your comfort and productivity.

reviews.title: What our members say
reviews.subtitle: Five-star reviews on Google Maps. Here's what our members appreciate.
reviews.r1_text: A wonderful place to work in Essaouira! The WiFi is fast, the coffee excellent and the atmosphere truly inspiring. I'll be back every time I visit!
reviews.r2_text: Best coworking in Essaouira without hesitation. The team is welcoming, the space is clean and well-equipped. Perfect for digital nomads like me.
reviews.r3_text: I spent a week at Rimal Network during my stay in Essaouira. Stable connection, delicious coffee, inspiring view. Highly recommended!
reviews.r4_text: The monthly subscription is really worth it. Dedicated desk, friendly community and work-friendly atmosphere. My office in Essaouira!

reservation.title: Book Your Space
reservation.subtitle: Fill in the form or contact us directly via WhatsApp or email.
reservation.success_msg: We'll get back to you quickly via WhatsApp or email.
reservation.info_hours:
Monday — Saturday: 9:30 AM – 9:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

menu.title: Rimal Menu
menu.subtitle: Made with love and passion — our drinks and dishes are homemade.
menu.bakery_note: Please ask for today's selection. Our bakery is homemade with love and passion.
menu.note: Filtered water, black coffee or tea included with every coworking membership

footer.tagline: Café · Coworking in the heart of Essaouira
